topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional

questions.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
questions.english: If I had money, I would buy this house.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had money, I would buy this house."
questions.grammarRule: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional
questions.category: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional practice

questions.hindi: अगर मैं तुम होता, तो मैं यह नहीं करता।

questions.grammarRule: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional
questions.category: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional practice
